3316060.name: Trapped Together
3316060.description:
Trapped Together is a co-op puzzle game about two friends on the brink of financial ruin who accept a mysterious offer: participate in the Neural Link Interface Experiment.

Promising a “perfect body” and a safe test environment, the experiment quickly reveals its true nature. The participants are forced in robotic bodies and send through a series of extreme, high-stakes puzzle trials designed to push the limits of the human mind.

Bound together by the experiment, they must rely on cooperation, trust, and communication to survive, and uncover the truth behind the system that trapped them.

Key Features

Trapped Together is a game built entirely around cooperation. From the very first room, you and your partner must work side by side to survive and progress. Actions are interconnected: pull a lever, move an object, reveal a path, everything you do can help or hinder your teammate. There is no solo solution. Victory only comes from true teamwork, shared planning, and perfect timing.

Puzzle-Driven Challenges
Each chamber introduces carefully crafted puzzles that evolve as you advance. Expect environmental interactions, multi-step logic, spatial challenges, and mechanics that change how you think about the space around you. Some solutions demand precision, others creativity. But all of them require two minds working as one. Experiment, observe, adapt, and overcome.

Robotic Bodies, Human Minds
You control powerful robotic bodies, yet remain constrained by fragile human instincts. Every movement feels heavy, every interaction deliberate, every perspective slightly unnatural, a constant reminder that this body is not truly yours.

Shared Failure & Success
Mistakes don’t just affect you, they affect both of you. Every wrong move, missed clue, or mistimed action echoes across the team. Learn from failure, adapt your approach, and overcome challenges together… or face the consequences side by side. In Trapped Together, success is shared. And so is failure.

Atmospheric Sci-Fi Setting
A dark, unsettling experimental facility surrounds you. Its silent halls filled with environmental storytelling, subtle world-building, and tension that grows with every step. The walls whisper of past experiments, forgotten failures, and truths best left undiscovered.

Communication Is Key
Information is never given to both players at once. One player might see symbols the other cannot. One may hear clues hidden in sound while the other navigates physical obstacles. Talking, describing, warning, and coordinating is essential. Silence is failure, communication is survival.

A Shared Story best explored together

The story of Trapped Together is one of betrayal, psychological tension, and exploration. At its core, it is a mystery, but it is far more than simply uncovering secrets. It is about trust tested under pressure, reality questioned at every turn, and a world that reveals itself only to those willing to face it together.

You awaken inside an unfamiliar facility, bound to powerful robotic bodies yet guided by fragile human minds. Strange systems watch your every move. Rooms shift, doors lock without warning, and voices echo with half truths. One moment you feel in control, the next you question whether the choices you make are truly your own.

As you progress deeper, motives blur and perceptions shift. The environment tells stories of experiments gone wrong, forgotten subjects, and observers hidden just beyond sight. Clues appear in symbols, sounds, and subtle changes in the world around you. Every discovery adds another piece to the puzzle, but also deepens the uncertainty of who to trust.

The bond between players is tested as much as the puzzles themselves. Cooperation becomes survival. Communication becomes instinct. Doubt becomes a constant companion. In a place built to study behavior, pressure reveals character, and character shapes fate.

By the time the truth begins to surface, you may find that escaping the facility is only part of the challenge. Understanding what brought you here, and what you have become along the way, is the real mystery waiting to be solved.
